name: John Major
ukDescription: John Major was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1990 to 1997.

name: Tony Blair
ukDescription: Tony Blair was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1997 to 2007.

name: Gordon Brown
ukDescription: Gordon Brown was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2007 to 2010.

name: David Cameron
ukDescription: David Cameron was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2010 to 2016.

name: Theresa May
ukDescription: Theresa May was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2016 to 2019.

name: Boris Johnson
ukDescription: Boris Johnson was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2019 to 2022.

name: Liz Truss
ukDescription: Liz Truss was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2022.

name: Rishi Sunak
ukDescription: Rishi Sunak is a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2022 to 2024.

name: Keir Starmer
ukDescription: Keir Starmer is a British politician who has served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom since 2024.
